## Use case

<!-- Describe the problem you're trying to solve. Start with WHY, not WHAT. Example: "I write technical books with chapter dependencies and want page references like `see Chapter 3` to render as live PDF links." -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What would the feature look like in practice? Concrete syntax, CLI flag, GUI option, etc. Code samples are welcome. -->

**Markdown syntax** (if applicable):

```markdown
proposed syntax here
```

**CLI flag** (if applicable):

```bash
python3 md2pdf.py input.md --new-flag value
```

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Other ways to achieve the same goal. Why is this better? -->

## Affected tools

- [ ] `md2pdf.py`
- [ ] `doc2md.py`
- [ ] `md2pdf-validator`
- [ ] macOS `.app` settings dialog

## Additional context

<!-- Examples from other tools (Pandoc, Typst, MkDocs, etc.), screenshots, mockups, related issues. -->

## Are you willing to implement this?

- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR if the design is approved.
- [ ] I can help with testing.
- [ ] I'm only requesting; someone else would need to implement.
